name: Burning Ice
overview: To protect the woman he loves, a white collar worker unintentionally becomes involved in a murder case and is from then on a suspect. In the blink of an eye, his quiet and boring life gets completely shaken up as he suddenly is both being chased by the police as well as gangsters.

trailers.title: 【DRAMA SERIES】BURNING ICE 无证之罪 (iQIYI ORIGINAL)
